# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      role: api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        role: api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: node
        image: node:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        env:
        - name: DB_URI
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: mongodb-secret
              key: uri
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  selector:
    role: api
  ports:
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
